Notes: Fouled Out: Bouffard (0:38) ... Goldey-Beacom clinches CACC Tournament berth
for 5th straight year ... Goldey-Beacom's 2nd straight win ... B. Richmond-
Peters (GBC) posts 4th double-double of year ... Chelsea Grover (GBC) scores
career-high 23 points ... KC Jentzen (DC) has 10th double-double of year.
Game.Officials: Paul Barksdale (R),  Diane Drake,  Brandi Upshaw
